import csv


def load_students(path):
    names = []
    ages = []
    grades = []
    with open(path) as f:
        reader = csv.DictReader(f)
        for row in reader:
            names.append(row["name"])
            ages.append(int(row["age"]))
            grades.append(float(row["grade"]))
    return names, ages, grades


def find_top_student(names, ages, grades):
    best_idx = grades.index(max(grades))
    return {
        "name": names[best_idx],
        "age": ages[best_idx],
        "grade": grades[best_idx],
    }
